TYPES.FPCLINE: EBELN TYPE EBELN, " Purchasing Document Number
BSART TYPE ESART, " Purchasing Document Type
LIFNR TYPE ELIFN, " Vendor Account Number
ZTERM TYPE DZTERM, " Terms of Payment Key
KNUMV TYPE KNUMV, " Number of the document condition
AEDAT TYPE ERDAT, " Date on Which Record Was Created
ZBD1T TYPE DZBDET, " Cash (Prompt Payment) Discount Days
SLFDT TYPE SLFDT, " Statistics-Relevant Delivery Date
J_1IEXRN TYPE J_1IEXRN, " Excise Registration Number
J_1ISERN TYPE J_1ISERN, " TIN nO./Service Tax Registration Number
J_1ICSTNO TYPE J_1ICSTNO, " Central Sales Tax Number
J_1ILSTNO TYPE J_1ILSTNO, " Local Sales Tax Number
BUTXT TYPE BUTXT, " Name Of Company Code Or Company
MP_ADRNR TYPE ADRNR, " Main Plant Address_number
V_ADRNR TYPE ADRNR, " Vendor Address Number
BANFN TYPE BANFN, " Purchase Requisition Number
UDATE TYPE CDDATUM, " Creation date of the change document
EBELP TYPE EBELP, " Item Number of Purchasing Document
MENGE TYPE BSTMG, " Purchase Order Quantity
MEINS TYPE BSTME, " Purchase Order Unit of Measure
* NETPR TYPE BPREI, " Net Price in Purchasing Document (in Document Currency)
NETPR TYPE char30, " Net Price in Purchasing Document (in Document Currency)
NETWR TYPE BWERT, " Net Order Value in PO Currency
GEWEI TYPE EGEWE, " Unit of Weight
BANFN TYPE BANFN, " Purchase Requisition Number
EINDT TYPE EINDT, " Item Delivery Date
SLFDT TYPE SLFDT, " Statistics-Relevant Delivery Date
ZEINR TYPE DZEINR, " Document number (without document management system)
VBELN TYPE VBELN, " Sales Order Number
VBELP TYPE VBELP, " Sales Order Item NUmber
ZEINR TYPE DZEINR, " Document number (without document management system)
GEWEI TYPE EGEWE, " Unit of Weight
KBETR TYPE STRING, "KBETR, " Rate (condition amount or percentage)
TT_CONDITIONS TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF T_CONDITIONS.
TT_TAX TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF STR_TAX.
TT_DIS TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ST_DIS.

INITIALIZATION.FPCLINE: SELECT SINGLE * FROM EKKO INTO XEKKO WHERE EBELN = LV_EBELN.
SELECT * FROM EKPO INTO TABLE XEKPO
SELECT * FROM EKET INTO TABLE XEKET
DATA : WA_EKPO LIKE LINE OF XEKPO,
DATA : IT_CDPOS TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF TY_CDPOS,
DATA : IT_CDPOS1 TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF TY_CDPOS,
DATA : IT_CDHDR TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF TY_CDHDR,
* Set the Purchase Requisition Number in the header data
* fetch The Value of delivery date for each of the list-items
READ TABLE XEKET INTO WA_EKET INDEX 1.
FROM ADRC AS A JOIN T005U AS B
ON ( B~LAND1 = A~COUNTRY AND B~BLAND = A~REGION )
SELECT SINGLE ADRNR NAME1 REGIO STCD3
SELECT SINGLE STCD3 REGIO FROM KNA1
SELECT SINGLE * FROM LFM1 INTO WA_LFM1
SELECT SINGLE BEZEI FROM T005U INTO BEZEI
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE IT_MARA
CONCATENATE WA_ITEM-ZEINR '-' INTO WA_ITEM-ZEINR SEPARATED BY space.
********* AVINASH BHAGAT CHANG FOR DRAWING NO UPDATE
SELECT SINGLE UDATE FROM CDHDR INTO LV_UDATE WHERE OBJECTID = WA_HDR-EBELN.
SELECT OBJECTID CHANGENR FROM CDPOS INTO TABLE IT_CDPOS WHERE OBJECTID = WA_ITEM-MATNR
SELECT OBJECTID CHANGENR FROM CDHDR INTO TABLE IT_CDHDR FOR ALL ENTRIES IN IT_CDPOS WHERE OBJECTID = WA_ITEM-MATNR
AND UDATE GE LV_UDATE AND CHANGENR = IT_CDPOS-CHANGENR .
READ TABLE IT_CDHDR INTO WA_CDHDR INDEX 1.
SELECT SINGLE VALUE_OLD FROM CDPOS INTO LV_ZEIVR WHERE OBJECTID = WA_ITEM-MATNR
AND TABNAME = 'MARA' AND FNAME = 'ZEIVR' AND CHANGENR = LV_CHANG.
SELECT SINGLE EINDT BEDAT FROM EKET
PERFORM GET_TEXT USING OBJNAME 'EKPO' 'F01' 'E' CHANGING WA_ITEM-ITM_TXT.
WHERE EBELN = WA_HDR-EBELN AND EBELP = WA_ITEM-EBELP.
PERFORM GET_TEXT USING OBJNAME 'VBBK' 'Z999' 'E' CHANGING WA_ITEM-ADTXT.
PERFORM GET_TEXT USING OBJNAME 'VBBP' 'Z888' 'E' CHANGING WA_ITEM-ADTXT.
DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM IT_TCOND COMPARING KSCHL .
READ TABLE IT_T685T INTO DATA(WA_T685T) WITH KEY KSCHL = W_TCOND-KSCHL .
LOOP AT TT_COND INTO DATA(WA_COND) WHERE KSCHL = W_TCOND-KSCHL .
READ TABLE XEKPO INTO DATA(WA_EKP) WITH KEY EBELP = LV_EBP .
DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM IT_KONP_T COMPARING KSCHL .
READ TABLE IT_KONP_T INTO DATA(WA_KONP_T) WITH KEY KSCHL = 'JICG'.
READ TABLE IT_KONP_T INTO WA_KONP_T WITH KEY KSCHL = 'JIIG'.
"if the condition type does not belong to the given list as mentioned above then it should not be included in the list
PERFORM CALCULATE_ITEM_TAX USING WA_HDR-EBELN WA_ITEM-EBELP ITEM_KONV.
LOOP AT ITEM_KONV INTO DATA(WA_KONV) WHERE KPOSN = WA_ITEM-EBELP.
WA_KONV-KSCHL = 'JMX1'. " To club them together under same Title - 'ModVAT'
* MODIFY lt_cond FROM wa_konv TRANSPORTING kschl WHERE kschl = 'FRB1'
* MODIFY lt_cond FROM wa_konv TRANSPORTING kschl WHERE kschl = 'ZOCQ'
MODIFY LT_COND FROM WA_COND1 TRANSPORTING KSCHL
MODIFY LT_COND FROM WA_COND1 TRANSPORTING KSCHL
PERFORM APPEND_CONDITION TABLES IT_KONV CHANGING BF_KONV.
IF ( NOT BF_KONV-KBETR IS INITIAL ) AND BF_KONV-WAERS IS INITIAL.
PERFORM APPEND_CONDITION TABLES IT_KONV CHANGING BF_KONV.
" CHANGE BY SAUMITRA START FOR REMOVING BOTH IF SQ_NO 7 HAS TW0 VALUES
LOOP AT IT_KONV INTO BF_KONV WHERE SQ_NO = 7.
FIND REGEX '([\d]{2}[\-|/][\d]{2}[\-|/][\d]{4})' IN WA_HDR-J_1ICSTNO SUBMATCHES WA_HDR-J_1ICSTDT.
FIND REGEX '([\d]{2}[\-|/][\d]{2}[\-|/][\d]{4})' IN WA_HDR-J_1ILSTNO SUBMATCHES WA_HDR-J_1ILSTDT.
PERFORM GET_TEXT USING OBJNAME 'VBBK' 'Z039' 'E' CHANGING GV_TEXT_TAG.
PERFORM GET_TEXT USING OBJNAME 'VBBK' 'Z999' 'E' CHANGING GV_TEXT_TPI.
* CONCATENATE LV_MAT_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_MAT_TEXT SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE..
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'GRUN' name = LV_TEXTNAME object = 'MATERIAL' IMPORTING lv_lines = DATA(lv_lines2) ).
* CONCATENATE LV_MAT_ES LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_MAT_ES SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE..
lo_text_reader->READ_TEXT_STRING_S( EXPORTING id = 'GRUN' name = LV_TEXTNAME object = 'MATERIAL' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines2 ).
MODIFY IT_ITEMS FROM WA_ITEM TRANSPORTING KNTTP_FLAG ITEM EBELP LV_MAT_TEXT1 LV_TAG GV_ZGAD1 DISPO LS_VBELN LS_VBELP LV_MAT_TEXT_ES GV_PC1 LV_TPI.
SELECT SINGLE ADRNR FROM TWLAD INTO @DATA(WA_TWLAD)
SELECT SINGLE STREET, CITY1, POST_CODE1 FROM ADRC
SELECT SINGLE * FROM ADRC INTO GS_ADRC
SELECT SINGLE * FROM T005U INTO GS_T005U
SELECT SINGLE BEZEI FROM T005U INTO BEZEI
DELETE IT_TEXT WHERE TDLINE IS INITIAL .
LOOP AT IT_TEXT INTO DATA(WA_TEXT) FROM 1 TO 7.
SELECT SINGLE ADRNR FROM TWLAD INTO @DATA(LV_ANR)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CDHDR INTO GV_REVCNT
GV_NOTE_2 = |W.r.t this Rejection Purchase Order we here by ask you to send Credit Note|.
GV_NOTE_2 = |We hereby ask you to deliver the following goods in accordance with our terms of delivery.|.
DATA : LT_LINES TYPE TABLE OF TLINE.
* CONCATENATE <LS_ITEM>-PO_TEXT WA_LINES1-TDLINE INTO <LS_ITEM>-PO_TEXT SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'F01' name = LV_TEXT1 object = 'EKPO' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines2 ).
*FORM tax_calc." USING po1 ino CHANGING ibed icst ivat iser iesr isch
SELECT SINGLE KNUMV FROM EKKO INTO KNUMV1
READ TABLE IT_ITEMS INTO WA_ITEM INDEX 1.
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF ITABS "(ebl, it)
DATA : IT_XKOMV TYPE KOMV OCCURS 0 WITH HEADER LINE.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM EKKO INTO IT_EKKO
SELECT SINGLE * FROM EKPO INTO IT_EKPO
CALL FUNCTION 'CALCULATE_TAX_ITEM' "This is tHe Function Module
READ TABLE IT_XKOMV WITH KEY KSCHL = 'JICG'. " AND
READ TABLE IT_XKOMV WITH KEY KSCHL = 'JICN'. " AND
READ TABLE IT_XKOMV WITH KEY KSCHL = 'JCIN'. " AND
READ TABLE IT_XKOMV WITH KEY KSCHL = 'JICR'. " AND
READ TABLE IT_XKOMV WITH KEY KSCHL = 'ZCRN'. " AND
READ TABLE IT_XKOMV WITH KEY KSCHL = 'JISG'. " AND
READ TABLE IT_XKOMV WITH KEY KSCHL = 'JISN'. " AND
READ TABLE IT_XKOMV WITH KEY KSCHL = 'JISR'. " AND
READ TABLE IT_XKOMV WITH KEY KSCHL = 'ZSRN'. " AND
READ TABLE IT_XKOMV WITH KEY KSCHL = 'JIIG'. " AND
READ TABLE IT_XKOMV WITH KEY KSCHL = 'JIIN'. " AND
READ TABLE IT_XKOMV WITH KEY KSCHL = 'ZIRN'. " AND
LOOP AT IT_KONV INTO BF_KONV WHERE SQ_NO < 100.
IF PFL_VAL IS NOT INITIAL AND PFL_RATE IS INITIAL.
ELSEIF PFL_VAL IS NOT INITIAL AND PFL_RATE IS NOT INITIAL. .
LS_TAX-TAX = 'Tax to be Paid by Delval'.
GV_FOOTER1 = 'Regd. Office : DelVal Flow Controls Private Limited'.
GV_FOOTER2 = 'B Cube Building, Bavdhan, Opp. Bavdhan Police Station, Pune-411021'.
GV_FOOTER1 = 'Regd. Office : DelVal Flow Controls Private Limited'.
GV_FOOTER2 = 'Row House No.101&102,Survey No. 54/3/4, Near Nikhil Garden, Wadgaon Buddruk Pune 411041 (India)'.
GV_FOOTER1 = 'Regd. Office : DelVal Flow Controls Private Limited'.
GV_FOOTER2 = '8, Dhanashree Apartments, Survey No. 133/1-2, Off ITI Road, Aundh, Pune 411007(INDIA)'.
ELSEIF ( WA_EKPO-RETPO = 'X' AND ( XEKKO-FRGKE = 'R' OR XEKKO-FRGKE = '2') ) .
* ls_dis-dis = '*Taxes may be charged as applicable under the relevant statute and rules applicable as on the date of Invoice.'.
DATA: lv_amount TYPE p DECIMALS 2, " VALUE '2318338.92', " test value
perform inr_curr using lv_amount CHANGING lv_result.
perform inr_curr using lv_amount CHANGING lv_result.

FORMS.FPCLINE: FORM format_num USING num CHANGING v_text.
DATA : v_num TYPE p LENGTH 4 DECIMALS 2,
FORM get_text USING objname TYPE tdobname
DATA : text_lines TYPE TABLE OF tline,
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = txt_id name = objname object = obj_typ IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines2 ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
FORM calculate_item_tax USING p_ebeln TYPE ekpo-ebeln
IF ekko-bstyp EQ bstyp-kont AND ekpo-abmng GT 0.
IF ekko-lifnr IS INITIAL AND NOT ekko-llief IS INITIAL.
* MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
FORM append_condition TABLES it_konv TYPE ty_tab_konv
FORM inr_curr USING lv_amount CHANGING lv_result.
DATA: "lv_amount TYPE p DECIMALS 2, " VALUE '2318338.92', " test value
" 2) Remove any thousand separators or spaces that might be present
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF ',' IN lv_num_str WITH ''. " remove comma thousands
*REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF ' ' IN lv_num_str WITH ''. " remove blanks
" 3) Split integer and decimal parts (now safe — no extra commas)
SPLIT lv_num_str AT '.' INTO lv_int lv_dec.
" 4) If integer part > 3 digits, format head every 2 digits from right
lv_head = lv_int+0(lv_head_len). " all but last 3 digits
" take two-digit chunks from the right and build formatted string
CONCATENATE lv_formatted ',' lv_tail '.' lv_dec INTO lv_result.
